_doc: Stage 09 input contract for fetch to extraction. Validated against runSourceExtractionPhase(), fieldExtractor.js, evidencePackV2.js, and orchestration DOMAIN.md on 2026-03-17.

legacy_runtime_names.note: The late-stage parsing flow still uses legacy phase08 variable names in runtime code.

transform_sequence: Classify fetched content and normalize per-host artifact metadata.
Flatten JSON-LD, embedded state, and network JSON buckets into field path/value pairs.
Extract DOM tables, DOM fallback rows, article text, manual/PDF content, and structured metadata sidecars.
Build evidence pack V2 with deterministic snippet hashing and field hints.
Run deterministic parser, component resolver, and conditional LLM extraction on unresolved fields.
Merge extraction, adapter, and LLM candidates into per-source records for downstream identity evaluation.
gates: Manufacturer adapter work only runs for manufacturer-role sources.
Structured metadata sidecar remains bounded by cache, timeout, and per-surface limits.
LLM extraction only runs when enabled, there are unresolved fields, and budget/guard checks pass.
Repair-query emission and blocked-domain cooldowns are handled around the same boundary but do not mutate the extraction contract itself.
